title: mentha × villosa var. heterophylla
intro: Mentha × villosa var. heterophylla, also known as lemon mint or hairy mint, is a hybrid mint species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. heterophylla include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural breath freshener. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, calm the digestive system, and provide a refreshing and invigorating scent.
